rs12913832.description: A chief HERC2 enhancer variant and strong European pigmentary marker driving light-pigment hair and blue eyes.

rs1800407.description: An OCA2 pigmentation marker whose ancestral alleles are primarily found in sub-Saharan populations.

rs1042602.description: A well-characterized missense variant (Gly323Asp) in the tyrosinase (TYR) gene. The A allele is associated with lighter skin pigmentation and is most prominent in European populations.

rs16891982.description: The 'G' allele is predominantly found in European populations and is heavily involved in light skin pigmentation.

rs1805007.description: Associated with red hair and fair skin in European populations.

rs1805008.description: Associated with red hair and fair skin in European populations.

rs1805009.description: The Asp294His mutation in MC1R is a moderate-to-strong red hair and fair skin allele. Found almost exclusively in European populations, it significantly contributes to UV-induced pigmentation phenotype.

rs12821256.description: A well-known regulatory variant in the KITLG gene (hair color modulator). The C allele represents the classic blond hair variant in European populations and is extremely rare outside Europe.
